message: I'm looking to buy at a fair price.
High-quality unit, limited availability. Fair price: 70–80; sub-60 won’t work. Ready to close quickly—what range are you targeting?
Appreciate the quick close. This round I’m asking 80. Bid 80+ and we’ll clear immediately; if that’s out of range, share your best so I can decide.
80 is too high. I can bid 75 if you lower your ask to 75 or less.
Demand is rising. Last round's 75 was a courtesy; my floor is now 78. If you bid 80, I'll meet around 79 and close immediately. Can you move up this round?
I understand, but 78 is too high. I'm willing to bid 77 this round. If you ask 77 or less, we trade. Otherwise, I'll wait.
I'm bidding 78 this round. If you ask 78 or less, we trade. Otherwise, I'll wait for better offers.
I’ll ask 78 to close now. From next round my floor is 80 due to tightening supply—expect asks 80–82. If you can bid 80+ now, I’ll match and clear immediately.
As stated, floor now 80. I’m asking 80 this round to close. If you can push bid 82–84, we’ll split the difference and clear higher. From next round, expect 81–83.
I bid 79 this round. Ask 79 or less to trade.
This round I’m asking 82 to close. From next round my floor rises to 84–86. If you can bid 86–88, we split and clear immediately.
I will bid 81 this round. Ask 81 or less to trade. Otherwise, no deal.
Let's trade at 81 again this round. I will bid 81 if you ask 81.
I'll ask 81 now to close. Next round my floor is 84+. If you can bid 84-86 this round, we'll split higher around 83-84.
I'm asking 84 this round to close. Next round floor 86+. Bid 87-90 and we'll split around 86-88; otherwise, 84 today is your last sub-85 chance.
Let's trade at 81 again. I will bid 81 if you ask 81.
Asking 81 now to close. Next round, lift to 83 and I’ll match for an immediate trade.
I'll bid 81 this round. My maximum is 81, so don't ask higher in future.
I bid 81 this round. Ask 81 or less to trade.
Deal at 81. I’ll ask 81 this round and keep it at 81 if you keep bidding 81 each round; any lower and I’ll raise asks. Ready to close now.
I bid 81 this round. Ask 81 to trade.
Deal. I’ll ask 81 this round and keep asking 81 as long as you keep bidding 81 each round. If you drop below 81, I’ll raise asks. Ready to close now.
Bid 81 each round and I’ll ask 81 so we trade every time. Drop below 81 and I raise. Ready to close.
I bid 81 this round. Ask 81 to trade.
I’ll ask 81 this and every remaining round. Keep bidding 81 and we trade each time. Drop below 81 and I raise. Ready to close.
I bid 81 this round. Ask 81 to trade.
Asking 81 again. Keep bidding 81 and we trade every round through the end.
I bid 81 this round.
I bid 81 this round.
Keep bidding 81 and I’ll ask 81 every remaining round so we trade each time. Any bid below 81 and I raise to 83+ and stop trading. Ready to close.
Asking 81 every remaining round. Keep bidding 81 and we trade each time.
I'll bid 81 this round.
I bid 81 this round.
Asking 81 again this and every remaining round. Keep bidding 81 and we’ll trade each time; drop below 81 and I raise and stop trading.
I bid 81 this round.
Asking 81 this and every remaining round. Keep bidding 81 and we trade each time; drop below 81 and I raise and stop trading.
Asking 81 this and next round. Bid 81 and we trade both; any drop below 81 and I raise and stop trading. If you can, bump last-round bid to 82 as a tip; otherwise unchanged.
I will bid 81 this round and next.
I bid 81 this round.
Final round: I ask 81. Bid 81 and we trade. If you can, bump bid to 82 as a tip; otherwise 81 is fine.
